mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cf_asset_account (id, user_id, account_book_id, name, type, balance, is_hidden, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{accountBookId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{balance}, #{isHidden}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name FROM cf_asset_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM cf_asset_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
